rationale: Educ. Code §34.013 governs school bus seat belt requirements. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 34.013. BUS SEAT BELT POLICY. A school district shall require a student riding a bus operated by or contracted for operation by the district to wear a seat belt if the bus is equipped with seat belts for all passengers on the bus.
_note: Rule text concerns school transportation safety; proposed change concerns property tax exemption. No overlap.
